svg.title: Rooms & room moves module
svg.desc: **Module.** The portion of the transaction workflow that helps staff assign rooms with short bed-layout descriptions and that records room moves by adding additional occupancy rows while preserving history for reporting.

g.text: 1 Queen · private bath w/ tub · stone fireplace · sleeps 2.
Each move adds a row — nothing is overwritten, so reports keep the
A move closes the current row's date and opens a new occupancy row —
guest names carry over and can be adjusted.
